utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , we are definitely on Route 27 .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay . We are at a rest stop on Route 27 . Okay . There is no Route 27 . Okay , either 93 or 76 ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do not know , I am sorry , I always slept in the back when we drove up here .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey , can you send somebody up and down 76 and check every rest stop , and , and also 93 ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , no they do not do that .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ugh , okay , well somebody will come and save us .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean have you seen a car come by here in the last hour and a half ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_have you seen a car come by here in the last hour and a half ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I think we should call Ross , maybe he can get a car and come pick us up .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ! No , I am not getting in a car with Ross , we will just have to live here !
